results.rendered_html: anuṣvadham (von 1. anu + svadhā) adv. dem Willen gemäss, freiwillig, von selbst, gern: kratvā mahā~ anuṣvadhaṃ bhīma ā vāvṛdhe śavaḥ  ṚV. 1,81,4 . anuṣvadhamā vaha mādayasva 2,3,11 . pibā somamanuṣvadhaṃ madāya 3,47,1 . anuṣvadhaṃ pavate soma indra te 9,72,5 .
